query: SELECT g.id, g.nome, g.telefone, g.clinicaId FROM gestantes g WHERE g.telefone IS NOT NULL AND g.telefone != '' AND g.id NOT IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partos WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL) AND g.id NOT IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM abortamentos WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY g.nome
